name: the-final-option
description: Hybrid NIFTY Options Trading Bot — Cloud Brain (Cloudflare) + Local Muscle (Node.js Daemon)

scripts.daemon:pm2: cd local-daemon && npx pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs
scripts.db:init: cd cloud && npx wrangler d1 execute thefinaloption-db --remote --file=./schema.sql
scripts.db:init:local: cd cloud && npx wrangler d1 execute thefinaloption-db --local --file=./schema.sql
